sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER, data STRING, timestamp TIMESTAMP);
SELECT argmin(data, ~value) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT arg_min(data, ~MAX(value)) AS min_data FROM test_table GROUP BY data HAVING min_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT arg_min(value, ~COUNT(*)) FROM test_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL) AS subquery_result;
CREATE TABLE second_table (user_id INTEGER, score REAL, comment STRING, score_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
INSERT INTO second_table VALUES (1, 100.5, 'Excellent', '2023-01-01'), (2, 20.1, NULL, '2023-01-02'), (3, NULL, 'Average', NULL), (4, ~MIN(15), 'Bad', '2023-01-04');
SELECT arg_min(comment, ~score) FROM (SELECT user_id, score, COALESCE(comment, 'No Comment') AS comment FROM second_table) WHERE score > 0 GROUP BY user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY score;

SELECT arg_min(data, ~value) FROM (SELECT id, value, COALESCE(data, 'Unknown') AS data FROM test_table WHERE timestamp >= '2023-01-01' AND timestamp < '2023-01-05') GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value) < 10;
SELECT id, arg_min(data, ~value) FROM (SELECT id, value, CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN CAST('0' AS INTEGER) ELSE value END AS value, data FROM test_table) GROUP BY id ORDER BY value DESC;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value, ~arg_min(data, COALESCE(value, 0)) AS adjusted_data FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
